Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Do you like movies?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Me too! Movies kick ass![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I love them because they're like a microcosm of real life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Man, that's sad... Later in life, you're going to regret not having seen lots of movies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}That guy next to the vending machine... He looks real depressed, doesn't he?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I get depressed too, when I feel like I wasted my money to watch a crappy movie, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}That's taking it to the extreme. Kinda freaks me out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Is this what people keep talking about? That Apathy Syndrome?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}All these new movies were released during Golden Week, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}They all sucked![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I'm sure everyone else who wasted their money on those turkeys is saying the same thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}The monorail was nearly in a big accident the other day. I heard it was just a few feet away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}It's just like one of those action thrillers, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Whoever stopped that train is a real-life hero![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}You know those incidents where people get Apathy Syndrome, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Those guys look so weird... They're all over town.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}If it was a sci-fi movie, it'd be aliens doing it. If it was a thriller, it'd be some secret organization.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}...But it's real life, so I have no idea what's happening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I sometimes see this girl sitting right over there, drawing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}She has red hair and a white, frilled dress... She stands out like a sore thumb.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}But just writing her off as some kind of weirdo doesn't sit right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}It feels like I'm in a scene from a movie whenever she's there. I kinda like it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}You know how, in movies, you see bodyguards with tattoos on their arms, and you know they're badass?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Well, I saw a guy like that in town. His arm was just completely covered in tattoos.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}He wasn't built like a bodyguard, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}He was rail-thin... Plus, he wasn't wearing a shirt. Really stuck out from the crowd.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A movie's theme song is very important.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}The quality of the movie is greatly affected by whether its theme song is any good or not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Which reminds me... Long ago, I heard there was going to be a Gekkoukan theme song.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I think it was called "Gekkoukan Boogie," or something like that. I heard it was nearly done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I want to hear how it turned out, but who the hell names their song "Boogie"...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}When you hear cicada sound effects on a show or a movie, doesn't it remind you of summer?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Did you know they usually cut the cicada sounds out when exporting movies or TV to other countries?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}In places with no cicada, when they hear that sound, they think it's just static or white noise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Here's a question for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Why do you think I'm so reluctant to catch movies at the theater during the summer?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}You got it! They blast the air conditioner all day in there![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I gotta bring a jacket even in this hot summer weather.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Well, that's true sometimes, but it doesn't really have to do with summertime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}How would I know!? That's a terrible joke...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}If this place goes out of business, I don't have anywhere else to go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}And who is this owner anyways? I'm here all the time, but I've never seen him before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Man, there are more and more of those people... But I'm getting used to them now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}All they do is say, "Ahh," and, "Uhhh," but they don't do anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I think it'd be cool if they started attacking us, like one of those horror movies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}It's September, and it's time for a new term. Did you get any transfer students?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I'm jealous... Your school life is just like a teen movie.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}You're a lucky kid. Go enjoy school while you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I thought not. Transfer students are usually pretty rare.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Popcorn is a staple for the movies, but I don't really eat the stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I can't be totally focused on the movie when I'm eating something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Though I guess some people can't focus if they're hungry...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}But that's when you need the moviegoing spirit! My passion for movies can overcome any hunger![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Man, wasn't that typhoon nuts?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}If it was a disaster movie, I'd be all for seeing those destructive winds...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}But I'd rather not experience that in person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I understand kids fighting, but murder is going too far.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}They make social dramas about this kind of thing, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I never thought it would happen around here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}It's the time of year when young couples come out to the theater together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}But oh, do they underestimate how graphic "romance" in movies can get![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}After the movie, they come out all awkward and silent![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Gets me every time. Heheh![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Gekkoukan's chairman died from falling from the observatory...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Usually, it's the bad guys who tend to die by falling from a high place, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Nah, that can't be right. I guess I've been watching too many movies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I should be praying for him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I heard the Gekkoukan class trip was the other day. School life... I get a little jealous.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}It puts me in the mood to watch those teenybopper love flicks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}*sigh* Whatever happened to that genre of movies, anyway...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}It's that time of the year when there's nothing but reruns on TV.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}But reruns aren't so bad, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}They make you nostalgic for your younger days, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}What would you do if the world was going to end?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I would just have fun, man. I mean, we're talking about lowering the curtain on all life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}I imagine it saying, "THE END," in big letters, and then a blooper reel from my life will start rolling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}If you think about it that way, it sounds a lot more fun, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}Sorry, but I don't believe in that cult stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}"Nyx is coming down"? I mean, what the hell, you know? There's only one thing that comes from the skies...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 419}That's right! UFOs! When it comes to invasions from above, accept no substitutes![n]{f 1 1}
